title: Derive Release 1216 from qualified Release 1215
description: Rebuild the exact Release 1215 source and permit only the reviewed five-path ritual-resonance delta.
close_reason: The dedicated staging tool reconstructs exact Release 1215, inventories it, and rejects changes outside 1dungeon, assistance, ritual_resonance, shadow_logic, and zork1.

title: Expose physical bell resonance
description: Add observation and room-specific bell responses while preserving canonical ring behavior at the Entrance to Hades.
close_reason: The cool and hot bell wrappers expose sound, heat, temple, mirror, and machinery reactions; the Hades ring still returns to canonical LLD-ROOM.

title: Make the black-book order discoverable
description: Preserve canonical damaged-page text while recording the resonance, paired-light, and prayer sequence without naming the solution objects.
close_reason: Turning or reading another page delegates to BLACK-BOOK and adds a non-spoiler ordering clue grounded in the surviving marginal marks.

title: Deepen paired candle behavior
description: Make the real candle pair observable and responsive without changing its original burn timer, lighting rules, or destructive misuse.
close_reason: The candle wrapper reports flame and burn state, delegates lighting and extinguishing to CANDLES-FCN, and adds only paired-flame observation.

title: Preserve and observe the canonical exorcism state machine
description: Record actual XB, XC, LLD-FLAG, bell transformation, and ghost-removal transitions without creating another completion route.
close_reason: RITUAL-LLD-ROOM snapshots and delegates to LLD-ROOM, then records only state changes performed by the original room routine.

title: Route narrow physical ritual combinations
description: Support bell and candles on mirrors, lit candles near the book, and real bottled water on the hot bell without adding spells.
close_reason: Ritual USE routing validates possession, flame, accessibility, and real bottled water, then delegates hot-bell cooling to canonical POUR-ON.

title: Add read-only ceremony and persistent recap reports
description: Expose learned and current ritual state without moving objects, starting timers, removing ghosts, or completing the puzzle.
close_reason: CEREMONY reports canonical state and RECAP remembers learned order, resonance, wrong order, cooling, and actual completion.

title: Qualify real ritual and preservation routes
description: Compile with pinned tools and prove discovery, mirrors, wrong-order failure, canonical exorcism, cooling, recap, and production isolation.
close_reason: The dedicated workflow stages exact Release 1215 and runs a test-only positioning story against the exact production mechanics under pinned native Glulxe.

title: Lock and publish Glulx Release 1216
description: Commit the deterministic artifact identity, finish documentation and review, rerun exact-head CI, and leave the stacked PR ready but unmerged.
